creator: pcm@pogotopia.net
text:
Created attachment 175073
Contains naemon.shar and poudiere testports logs

Hi,

Naemon is the new monitoring suite that aims to be fast, stable and innovative while giving you a clear view of the state of your network and applications.

After about a month of work i got a working port of www.naemon.org. This port is the port of naemon-livestatus. It depends on net-mgmt/naemon-core and for a full naemon suite www/thruk needs to be installed.

portlint -AC:
WARN: Makefile: Consider adding support for a NLS knob to conditionally disable gettext support.
WARN: Makefile: no ftp/http mirror in MASTER_SITES for users behind a proxy.
0 fatal errors and 2 warnings found.

I've attached the poudriere testport logs and also the naemon.shar.

Cheers,
